docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,888.65 FILED BY ANZALONE, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT QAQUNDAH, SALIBA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
